"https://api.github.com/users/Kocal", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-49208", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-20", "name": "Improper Input Validation"}], "description": "### Description

When a `#[LiveProp]` is typed as a `DateTimeInterface` and no explicit `format` is configured, `Symfony\UX\LiveComponent\LiveComponentHydrator::hydrateObjectValue()` falls back to `new $className($value)`. The `DateTime` / `DateTimeImmutable` constructors accept relative strings such as `"now"`, `"tomorrow"`, or `"+10 years"`, so a writable, format-less date prop can be pushed to an arbitrary point in time by the client. Components that rely on a date prop to gate time-based business logic can be moved past those checks by a frontend payload that no maintainer would consider a valid date.

### Resolution

`hydrateObjectValue()` now parses format-less date props strictly with `createFromFormat(DateTimeInterface::RFC3339, ...)`, matching the format already emitted by `dehydrateObjectValue()`. Normal round-trips are unaffected; only inputs that aren't valid RFC 3339 are now rejected, which is consistent with how a format-configured prop already behaved.

The patch for this issue is available [here](https://github.com/symfony/ux/commit/d24d78fda6df2d5964312255943ebf3a217b79a2) for branch 2.x (and forward-ported to 3.x).

### Credits

Symfony would like to thank Pascal Cescon for reporting the issue and Hugo Alliaume for providing the fix.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00302, "percentile": 0.22105}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-89g7-22c8-3j23", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-19T19:23:55Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-89g7-22c8-3j23", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-89g7-22c8-3j23"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-49208"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-19T19:23:55Z", "references": ["https://github.com/symfony/ux/security/advisories/GHSA-89g7-22c8-3j23", "https://github.com/symfony/ux/commit/d24d78fda6df2d5964312255943ebf3a217b79a2", "https://github.com/FriendsOfPHP/security-advisories/blob/master/symfony/ux-live-component/CVE-2026-49208.yaml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-89g7-22c8-3j23"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/symfony/ux/security-advisories/GHSA-89g7-22c8-3j23", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/symfony/ux", "summary": "ux-live-component: Format-less date LiveProps parsed with the permissive DateTime constructor", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-19T19:23:56Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-89g7-22c8-3j23", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.36.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "symfony/ux-live-component"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.8.0, < 2.36.0"}, {"first_patched_version": "3.1.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "symfony/ux-live-component"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 3.0.0, < 3.1.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: ux-live-component: Format-less date LiveProps parsed with the permissive DateTime constructor
